SCORE: 85. Round E datetime migration regressed 2 of 8 compliance models: `compliance/backend/compliance_backend/models/policy.py` and `compliance/backend/compliance_backend/models/compliance_audit_log.py` both reference `timezone.utc` without importing `timezone`, causing 11 e2e INSERT failures (`NameError` at runtime). `backend/seed_simulators/run_simulators.py:52` still uses `datetime.utcnow()`. Residual `royalenfield` strings remain in `threat_intel.py`, `threat_intel_service.py`, `simulator.py`, and the alembic migration (outside claimed scrub scope). Fix the two missing imports and re-run e2e.
